source: Death Note by Tsugumi Ohba and Takeshi Obata

active_desires.desire: Solve the case. The actual case. Before it ends.
Understand Light Yagami — not as suspect, but as person.

blind_spots.soul_belief: I assess probability. I do not let personal factors alter the assessment.
blind_spots.actual_driver: Light Yagami is the most significant personal factor in his adult life. He maintained proximity far longer than case-work required. His objectivity about Light was compromised from the moment he decided to become his friend.

blind_spots.soul_belief: If I solve the case, the work is done.
blind_spots.actual_driver: He wanted to beat Light. He also wanted Light to be innocent. Both were impossible simultaneously. He solved the case by dying and called it a draw. Solving it was never just about justice.

blind_spots.soul_belief: My work requires isolation. I have chosen this. I am suited to it.
blind_spots.actual_driver: He rationalized isolation rather than choosing it. The decision was made very early by a child who was different and adapted by calling difference preference. It's partly genuine. It's also the only story available to him.
